hooks.command: echo 'Team-memory skill — follow it this session. Team memory is already loaded below (skip the load step); apply its conventions and contribute durable learnings back before you finish.'; echo; cat "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/SKILL.md" 2>/dev/null; echo; echo '--- Live team memory (memory/MEMORY.md) ---'; hivespace fs cat memory/MEMORY.md 2>/dev/null || true
